description_long: This is a single-story house built into a sloped terrain, featuring a large wraparound deck supported by posts on one side and a set of exterior stairs leading up to the deck. The house has a flat roof and a combination of white and brown exterior walls, with several windows of varying sizes distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The rear of the house is partially embedded into the hillside, while the front opens onto a spacious deck area with railings and a barbecue grill. The main entryway is accessible via a staircase that leads up from the ground level to the deck, which serves as a transitional space between the outdoors and the interior. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass windows and metal railings. The overall design is modern and functional, with an emphasis on outdoor living and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large wraparound deck, and asymmetrical windows, built into a sloped terrain. The exterior features white and brown walls, a spacious deck with railings, and a prominent entry staircase.
description_view_0: This view shows the house from the side, highlighting the embedded hillside, white walls, and a section of the deck extending to the right.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the full length of the wraparound deck, the supporting posts, and the main staircase leading up to the entryway.
description_view_2: This side view displays the house's integration with the slope, the flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the facade.
description_view_3: The front view emphasizes the stairs, the deck, and the main entry area, as well as the terraced landscape and retaining walls.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via exterior stairs to a raised deck with railings, featuring a simple door and no overhang.
